default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: Thank you for your kind reception. For me, this simply means moving from my old cage to a new one.

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: If it's your request, I can accept it.

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: ...So this means I can't even die, can I?

default.title: Level Start
default.text: I will complete the mission.

default.title: Victory
default.text: Keep solving puzzles. Keep gaining victories.

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: Mole detected. Operation aborted.

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: I will unveil the truth for you.

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: This is the promised... death.

default.title: Greeting
default.text: You seem less busy today. Is it why you've come to see me?

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: My homeland has perished, so why should I continue to live? Can you give me an answer?

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: I can see those radio waves drifting through the air, inscribed as epitaphs for every era.

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: When I was young, I once told my friends, "Let's build a better country together." Everyone was laughing back then. We were so foolish, so naive. We still dreamed and hoped for the future.

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: Even if you stare at me like that, I won't tell you. That is my deepest... secret...

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: I am a stubborn ghost from a bygone era. Without your help, I would never have adapted to this new world.

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: I miss my homeland, where cornflowers swayed in the breeze. After school, we would stroll along the field ridges under the evening star, gazing at the horizon as if peering into our distant future.

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: Time flies. We've been next to each other for so long... Chief, I still wish to die, but I promise you, not yet. When that time comes, I want you to be the one to... dissect my brain and my memories. Let me bare my thoughts and secrets completely before you. Let me give you my everything.

default.title: Idle
default.text: I had a long, long dream in the dark... until someone tapped on the glass and woke me up... Ever since then, the true cipher has not been in radio waves, but in that dream where raindrops were pattering on glass.

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: I'm not used to being touched like this...

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: Wind, clouds, rain, snow—these are all ciphers written by nature. Decode them, and you can understand the world. Gazes, pulses, breaths, heartbeats... these are the ciphers of humanity. Decode them, and you can understand a person. Yes, I am watching you. I am... trying to understand you.

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: Intelligence gathering is a basic skill for any agent... Leave it to me.

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: This should be enough.

default.title: Level Up
default.text: Is it worth it... to invest so much in me?

default.title: Pat Head
default.text: Secrets should vanish in the wind, just as rain disappears into water.
